{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Kameira-derived alchemist’s formula
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Kameira]]-derived alchemist's formula is used to treat a breathing reed to repel water.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
